subcodes.title: Words to newspaper reporters, spoken on 1912-04-11
subcodes.first_line: There are good and bad newspapers. Those which strive to speak only that which is truth, which hold the mirror up to the truth, are like the sun
subcodes.subjects: @newspapers and the media; publications, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @Manifestation of God as sun, @the power of words; of speech, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence
